# N8n Mcp

Editor's Note

The N8n MCP server provides AI assistants with comprehensive access to n8n's workflow automation platform, exposing 1,396 nodes (812 core and 584 community), their properties, operations, and documentation through structured tools. It enables AI models like Claude to understand and work with n8n's node ecosystem by providing detailed schemas, operational coverage, real-world configuration examples, and a template library of 2,709 workflows. This server bridges the gap between AI models and n8n automation, allowing assistants to help users design, understand, and potentially generate workflow configurations while emphasizing safety practices for production environments.

## Install

```
claude mcp add --transport stdio czlonkowski-n8n-mcp uvx n8n-mcp
```
